details.reasoning: Excellent implementation that fully meets all rubric requirements. The agent correctly added: (1) unsloth_export_to_onnx function with _LoRAAdapter helper class that properly saves LoRA A and B matrices; (2) correct signature accepting save_directory and opset_version parameter defaulting to 17; (3) comprehensive metadata saved to adapter_metadata.json including rank, lora_alpha, target_modules, opset_version, and per-adapter details; (4) properly exposed via __all__ export and patched into model class as export_to_onnx method in patch_saving_functions; (5) uses torch.onnx.export with proper configuration (dynamic axes, input/output names, do_constant_folding); (6) follows unsloth conventions with @torch.no_grad(), proper docstring, type hints, error handling, logger usage, and consistent patterns. Minor deduction only for lack of explicit error handling around torch.onnx.export itself (though general structure is solid).
